proposal1.heroHeadline: Intelligence is losing $250,000 annually on manual proposal crafting. Here is exactly how it slips away.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually creating proposals drains hours, while our system delivers them in 47 seconds, tailored to your network-driven services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every moment spent on manual proposal writing is a moment of potential loss.

problems.title: Dragging Proposal Hours
problems.description: Crafting each proposal takes up to 3 hours. That's 3 hours not spent on building valuable connections, costing you potential deals.

problems.title: Lost Client Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean missed opportunities. Each day of delay could be a deal lost to a faster competitor.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistencies
problems.description: Inconsistent branding in proposals can confuse prospects. This inconsistency can dilute your message and reduce trust.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying staff for manual proposal creation adds up. At $50/hour, 10 proposals a month cost you $18,000 annually.

problems.title: Untracked Engagement
problems.description: Without tracking, you don't know which proposals engage prospects. This lack of insight can lead to repeated mistakes.

problems.title: Inflexibility in Customization
problems.description: Manually adjusting proposals for each client is time-consuming. This inflexibility can cost you clients who need quick, tailored responses.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Here's how our AI system transforms your proposal process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Our system generates them in under 60 seconds, freeing your time for client engagement.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistent branding dilutes your message. Our system ensures every proposal is on-brand and professional.

solutions.title: Engagement Tracking
solutions.description: Lack of tracking means missed insights. With our system, see exactly how prospects interact with your proposals.

solutions.title: Effortless Customization
solutions.description: Customizing proposals manually is labor-intensive. Our system tailors each proposal to client needs instantly.

solutions.title: Cost-Effective Solutions
solutions.description: Manual drafting increases labor costs. Our system reduces these costs by automating the entire process.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Intelligence's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Intelligence around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Intelligence.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp with Data-Driven Connections.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our plan will harness AI to enhance Acme Corp's network, driving growth through strategic relationships.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is experiencing significant revenue losses due to untapped network potential.

problems.title: Lost Sales Opportunities
problems.description: Every missed connection is a potential sale unmade. Acme Corp is losing approximately $500,000 annually in potential sales by not leveraging their network.

problems.title: Inefficient Networking
problems.description: Inefficient networking processes lead to wasted time. This results in an estimated loss of 200 productive hours per month.

problems.title: Underutilized Contacts
problems.description: Valuable contacts are not being engaged, resulting in a 30% drop in potential collaborations that could drive innovation.

problems.title: Weak Market Position
problems.description: Without strong strategic partnerships, Acme Corp risks losing market position, missing out on key industry insights.

problems.title: Customer Churn
problems.description: Lack of relationship-building tools leads to a 15% increase in customer churn, impacting long-term revenue stability.

problems.title: Stalled Growth
problems.description: Without a robust strategic relationship strategy, growth is stunted, leading to a 10% annual growth rate shortfall.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these challenges by activating Acme Corp's network potential.

solutions.title: Network Analysis
solutions.description: Identifies and activates valuable connections within your existing network. This will enhance opportunities and reduce lost sales.

solutions.title: AI-Driven Insights
solutions.description: Uses AI to uncover hidden opportunities and insights in Acme Corp's network, leading to more efficient and productive relationships.

solutions.title: Strategic Relationship Management
solutions.description: Optimizes how you engage with key contacts, reducing churn and improving market position through strengthened partnerships.

solutions.title: Custom Integration Solutions
solutions.description: Tailored solutions that embed seamlessly into your workflow, driving innovation and sustained growth.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: At Intelligence, we turn networks into powerful growth engines.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team has consistently delivered results by transforming networks into valuable assets.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We leverage cutting-edge technology to provide tailored solutions that meet your unique needs.

whyUsCards.title: AI-Powered Results
whyUsCards.description: Our AI-driven approach ensures that you get actionable insights that drive real business growth.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your goals and work closely with you to achieve them.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to transforming your business.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships with a focus on delivering measurable results. Committed to transforming networks into growth engines.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery and Analysis
process.description: Understanding your current network and identifying opportunities.

process.title: Strategic Planning
process.description: Developing a tailored strategy to enhance your network.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Executing the strategy with our innovative solutions.

process.title: Review and Optimize
process.description: Evaluating results and optimizing for continued success.
